calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Court Records
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shoshana J. Raphael, Esq. of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, Tel:415.956.8100, for defendand and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRIAN BOGOSIAN's Motion To Seal Court Records is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Order signed. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
